title: spec_retired event payload
$comment: Class: REQUIRES_SPEC_ID. Records the governed retirement of a never-activated DRAFT spec (CAWS-SPECS-RETIRE-DRAFT-001). Retirement is a tombstone, mirroring spec_archived's post-CAWS-ARCHIVE-AS-TOMBSTONE-001 shape: the draft yaml is deleted from disk and this event carries the git blob_sha needed to reconstruct the body via `git show <blob_sha>`. There is no legacy variant — this event type is new. retire-draft refuses non-draft specs and refuses drafts not tracked at HEAD (blob_sha would be unavailable), so blob_sha is always a real 40-hex sha here.

from_path.description: Repo-root-relative path the draft yaml occupied before deletion (e.g. .caws/specs/FOO-001.yaml).

blob_sha.description: Full 40-hex git blob sha of the draft yaml content at the moment of retirement. Authoritative recovery target via `git show <blob_sha>` (topology-independent).

source_commit_sha.description: Optional. Commit that last contained from_path. Human-audit metadata only; recovery uses blob_sha.

reason.description: Optional human-readable note on why the draft was retired.
